of Diwali:
Doing Shri Krishna Gayatri Mantra and
offering dhoop, deep and agarbati to Lord
Krishna will bring in lots of prosperity and
remove hurdles and negative blockages from
life.
It is also a great day to start your journey in
spirituality and understand Krishna and his
pastimes in a detailed manner.
DIWALI REMEDIES
This is the special edition for remedies to be
performed on Diwali to improve Moon as it is
falling on a Monday and bring prosperity &
peace in life as Diwali night is very auspicious
to perform certain upay (remedies). While drawing the above yantra, please recite
this Doha as mentioned below:
Every year during Diwali, people worship
and do a lot of Tapasya (Penance) as this is
the time period when the cosmos are open
and you can easily take up the energies from
the universe and solve most of your problems
